title: Nested corelib submodule
description:
Moves stdlib ownership to nested **corelib** / **beskid_standard** submodules: superrepo wiring, compiler-embedded `corelib` for standalone CI, **stdlib artifact manifests** in **pckg**, CLI provisioning isolation, and cleanup retries — so registry, CLI, and compiler CI share one stdlib source and duplicate in-tree `standard_library` trees are removed.

## Provenance
- **Closing repository:** `compiler`
- **Closing commit:** [`8fa00e9`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/8fa00e9)
- **Subject:** Resolve stdlib only from nested corelib submodule
- **Superrepo pin:** [`3552572`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/3552572) (nested corelib submodule enforcement on `beskid`)
- **Closed:** 2026-04-10

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `corelib-packaging`
- **Milestone:** `v01-corelib-submodule` (deliverable **#2**)

## Relation
Anchored tasks: `corelib-submodule`, `stdlib-corelib-only`. Broader **corelib-packaging** band includes `corelib-standard-submodule`, `superrepo-compiler-submodule`, `stdlib-artifact-manifest-superrepo`, `pckg-stdlib-manifest-ui`, `pckg-submodule-wire`, `e2e-stdlib-isolation`, `cli-stdlib-cleanup-retry`, and pckg deploy/bootstrap tasks (`pckg-coolify-compose`, `pckg-onboarding`, bootstrap login flows). Follows **v01-compiler-parity** and precedes **ci-release** CLI upload hardening and **v01-open-vsx**.
